Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ornheim]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 9''' — Ornheim is a Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 23''' — Ornheim is a location containing mounds of bleeding stone.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Ornheim is a location associated with the obsidian wolf golems.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Ornheim is an Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — The Incarnation of Ornheim was sealed beneath the earth three centuries ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Ore for the armor was mined from Ornheim.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Ornheim is a Territory characterized by rocks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Ornheim is one of the four Incarnations identified by Indirial.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — The Elysian Incarnation has recruited twenty-eight Ornheim Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — A red Gate could lead into parts of Ornheim.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Ornheim is a nine or ten foot tall giant of white stone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Ornheim raised a red-and-black sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Ornheim used a gatecrawler to slice his way into Elysia.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
